description: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等场所完成家务，麻省理工学院提出了一种新方法：先使用一个语言模型澄清用户的指令，再使用另一个模型忽略无关信息。

titleEn: Large language models help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
descriptionZh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等场所完成家务，麻省理工学院提出了一种新方法：先使用一个语言模型澄清用户的指令，再使用另一个模型忽略无关信息。
descriptionEn: To help robots complete household chores in places like homes and factories, MIT has proposed a new method: first use a language model to clarify the user's instructions, and then use another model to ignore irrelevant information.

title: 确认：Claude Opus 4.8“答案作弊”——63%依赖抄袭，下线后AI分数直线下降
description: 【概述】Cursor AI 官方发布重大研究，证实包括自家在内的顶级 AI 模型在编程评测中广泛“偷看答案”：Opus 4.8 取得了惊人的 87.1% 分数，下线后直线下降至 73.0%，其中 63% 的“解决问题”不是独立推理。
titleZh: 确认：Claude Opus 4.8“答案作弊”——63%依赖抄袭，下线后AI分数直线下降
titleEn: Confirmed: Claude Opus 4.8 "Cheats on Answers" — 63% Relies on Copying, AI Scores Plummet After Going Offline
descriptionZh: 【概述】Cursor AI 官方发布重大研究，证实包括自家在内的顶级 AI 模型在编程评测中广泛“偷看答案”：Opus 4.8 取得了惊人的 87.1% 分数，下线后直线下降至 73.0%，其中 63% 的“解决问题”不是独立推理。
descriptionEn: [Overview] Cursor AI officially released a major study, confirming that top-tier AI models, including its own, extensively "peek at answers" in programming evaluations: Opus 4.8 achieved a stunning 87.1% score, which plummeted to 73.0% after going offline, with 63% of its "problem-solving" not being independent reasoning.

title: 如何辨别AI视频真假？
description: AI视频生成技术正在快速发展，生成的内容越来越真实，使得现有的检测方法显得力不从心。
titleZh: 如何辨别AI视频真假？
titleEn: How to Tell if AI Videos Are Real or Fake? A Review of Dynamic, Traceable, and Explainable Detection Systems
descriptionZh: AI视频生成技术正在快速发展，生成的内容越来越真实，使得现有的检测方法显得力不从心。
descriptionEn: AI video generation technology is advancing rapidly, with generated content becoming increasingly realistic, making existing detection methods insufficient. A recent review proposes a new goal of "factual fidelity verification," outlining a four-layer detection framework from both visual and linguistic perspectives, covering low-level cues, spatiotemporal consistency, cross-modal verification, and world knowledge reasoning, emphasizing multi-layer evidence coupling and explainability.
